opportunities.title: Simplify Checkout Flow
opportunities.description: Reduce checkout from 6 steps to 2 by combining shipping, billing and review into a single screen.

opportunities.title: Add Guest Checkout
opportunities.description: Let users complete a purchase without creating an account, with an optional save-details prompt after.

opportunities.title: Real-time Delivery Tracking
opportunities.description: Integrate live courier GPS data so delivery status reflects actual location, not static milestones.

opportunities.title: More Payment Options
opportunities.description: Support UPI, wallets and BNPL at checkout to reduce payment-step drop-off.

opportunities.title: Self-serve Returns Flow
opportunities.description: Add a return-initiation flow inside order history so users don't need to contact support.

opportunities.title: Size Exchange Without Return
opportunities.description: Allow a direct size swap that ships the new size before the old one is received back.

opportunities.title: Upfront Shipping Cost Display
opportunities.description: Show shipping fees on the product page instead of only at final checkout.

opportunities.title: Save Multiple Delivery Addresses
opportunities.description: Let small-business users store and switch between office and warehouse addresses.
